name: Peach Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add the eggs and milk to the dry ingredients. Mix until well combined.
3. Stir in the vegetable oil.
4. Fold in the diced peaches, sugar, and cinnamon.
5. Heat a pan with fat (375 degrees) over medium heat.
6. Drop spoonfuls of batter into the hot fat.
7. Fry for 2 to 3 minutes on each side until golden brown.
8. Mix the remaining sugar and cinnamon together.
9. Roll the fritters in the sugar-cinnamon mixture until coated.
10. Serve while warm. Makes 2 and a half dozen.
